items.claim: Tracy Cortez has superior MMA skills compared to Kong Wang.
items.quote: one of these fighters is really good at MMA as a whole and the other fighter just has some big power

items.claim: Kong Wang lacks the ability to get back to her feet once taken down.
items.quote: Kong Wang can't get back up to her feet

items.claim: Damen Pen has the best one-two combination in the 185-pound division.
items.quote: that one two is maybe the best at 185 pounds right now

items.claim: Caesar Almeida is physically past his prime at 38 years old.
items.quote: 38 years old. He's not gonna go on a run here and fight for a championship

items.claim: Zach Reese lacks a disciplined game plan and abandons strategy during fights.
items.quote: Zach Reese does not have a game plan. He just goes out there, fights, tries to play to the crowd.

items.claim: Ryan Gandra possesses significantly more knockout power than Zach Reese.
items.quote: the guy with more power is going to knock him out

items.claim: Cody Duran is fighting on short notice.
items.quote: I think Cody Duran's taken this fight on short notice.
